TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Jacob_Zuma, title = Jacob_Zuma, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jacob_Zuma} }

S.FORM: = Jacob Zuma = Mntucing hngkawas 1942 idas 4 jiyax 12 ka Jacob Zuma ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan South africa ta sayang o kiya ka Jacob Zuma, pnaah hngkawas 2009 idas 5 jiyax 9 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = ɟaʦob *uma = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ɟaʦob *uma ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan soutħ a*ɾiʦa ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɟaʦob *uma, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
S.FORM: = Jacob Zuma = Mntucing hngkawas 1942 idas 4 jiyax 12 ka Jacob Zuma ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan South africa ta sayang o kiya ka Jacob Zuma, pnaah hngkawas 2009 idas 5 jiyax 9 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = ɟaʦob *uma = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ɟaʦob *uma ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan soutħ a*ɾiʦa ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɟaʦob *uma, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
